data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will bring extremely hot weather to the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. A trough of low pressure will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the region later tomorrow to Saturday. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong over the weekend. High temperature weather will be alleviated slightly. The southerly airstream is expected to affect the coast of Guangdong gradually early to midweek next week. It will become very hot over the region. Meanwhile, a broad trough of low pressure will bring unsettled weather to the central part of the South China Sea. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Jangmi will move across the western North Pacific to the east of the Philippines in the next couple of days and intensify gradually. It will then move in the general direction of the seas east of Taiwan to the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260529","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"West to southwest force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine. Extremely hot during the day.
